chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-226 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 1119/2025 For hearing of main case 12.03.2025 Ms Seema Khan Advocate along with Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with SIP Imam Bux Mallah IO PS Pir Jo Goth. IO has recorded statement of the Petitioner No.1 which reiterates as stated earlier that she has got married with Petitioner No.2 with their own sweet will. IO has submitted Report according to which the father of Petitioner No.2 has been arrested. IO present states that it will be ensured on his part that the release of the said person arrested shall be effected within three days as Report shall be filed and final Orders obtained. In the present circumstances, making the statement of the IO as rule of the Court, Petition stands disposed of providing direction to ensure that no further arrest in the matter to take place and the Petitioners be provided protection. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider §
